ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., FanOut, FanIn) */,
  "rows_with_data" INTEGER /* Total rows with data for the metric */,
  "faulty_rows_with_data" INTEGER /* Number of faulty rows within the dataset */,
  "non_faulty_rows_with_data" INTEGER /* Number of non-faulty rows within the dataset */,
  "percentage_faulty" REAL /* Percentage of rows that are faulty */,
  "percentage_total_faults" REAL /* Percentage of total faults in the dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software where the metric was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was collected */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., structural, performance) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Actual value of the metric */,
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the calibration settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faulty_rows" (
  "fault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faulty row */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that contains the faulty row */,
  "row_number" INTEGER /* Row number in the dataset that is faulty */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error found in the row */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the faulty row is located */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number of the faulty row */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faulty_rows_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faulty_rows_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_faulty_rows" (
  "non_fault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-faulty row */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that contains the non-faulty row */,
  "row_number" INTEGER /* Row number in the dataset that is non-faulty */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the non-faulty row is located */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number of the non-faulty row */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_fault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_faulty_rows_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_faulty_rows_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's code repository */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being analyzed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "observations" TEXT /* Observations made during the analysis */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "tool_used" TEXT /* Tool used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in minutes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_analysis_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_analysis_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization (e.g., Developer, QA) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Developer, QA) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_metrics" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software where the metric was collected */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value applied to the metric */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_calibration_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_calibration_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the message has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., metric update, project status) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
